meta.source: State WARN portals (aggregated via Phase-1 manifests)
meta.note: WARN = Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification Act. Employers with 100+ employees must give 60 days' notice for mass layoffs (50+). A1-eligible corroboration. Threshold-limited, state-uneven, timing-variable — NOT a count of all layoffs.

notices.notes: Partial TX-only corroboration of the broader LM-0002 reduction (national total larger).
